$schema: Prospects feed v1 — committed weekly by Claude/cowork skill

prospects.summary: Branch just hired a new CFO and launched an embedded digital wallet with Stripe. Two analytics directors on staff confirm budget — no confirmed product analytics tool.
prospects.overview: Branch is a workforce payments platform helping businesses pay hourly workers faster via earned wage access, instant pay, and an embedded digital wallet. 278 employees, headquartered in Minneapolis. Key verticals: hospitality, logistics, healthcare. Recently launched Branch Embedded (Sep 2025) — a white-label payments product for enterprise clients built on Stripe.
whyNow: New CFO hired Feb 2026 — fresh exec, tooling decisions being revisited
Stripe embedded wallet launched Mar 2026 — new product surface needs behavioral instrumentation
Branch Embedded live since Sep 2025 — 6 months in, time to measure feature adoption by vertical

signals.label: Exec Change
signals.detail: Matthew Peterson hired as CFO Feb 2026 (prev CFO at Snappy) — new exec brings fresh tooling review cycle

signals.label: Product Launch
signals.detail: Stripe embedded digital wallet partnership announced Mar 2026 — new payment product surface requires user behavior analytics

signals.label: Hiring
signals.detail: Engineering hiring at 12-month high as of Nov 2025 — building fast across platform, UX, and payments infra

tasks.title: Reach out to Lies De Feyter (Director, Analytics & Insights)
tasks.detail: Sharpest Amplitude champion. Lead with: 'You have two analytics directors and a new CFO — what does your product analytics stack look like today?'

tasks.title: LinkedIn to David Tran (Head of Product)
tasks.detail: Branch Embedded just hit 6 months live. Ask: 'How are you measuring adoption across your hospitality and logistics verticals?'

tasks.title: Email Mitchell Coopet (CTO) on Session Replay angle
tasks.detail: Payments UI is high-stakes — drop-off in wallet setup costs real revenue.

tasks.title: Enroll in FinTech/HRTech Outreach sequence
tasks.detail: Tag in SFDC. Note new CFO hire and Stripe launch as timing hooks.
